title: Harris Ultimate Woodworks Gloss Triangular No Loss Paint Brush, 2in
features: For use with gloss, eggshell and satin paints
For use when painting areas of wooden trim such as skirting boards, doors and window sills
For best results rub the brush with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles
After painting with oil-based paints such as gloss, satin and eggshell. These paints require specialised cleaners, please refer to the paint tin for further guidance
description: This 2in Harris Ultimate Woodwork Gloss paint brush uses our patented No-Loss technology so there is no bristle loss while you are painting It gives the finest finish and has been developed specifically for use with gloss, eggshell and satin paint thanks to a specialised blend of synthetic filaments Finest Finish.
